rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added data_flow edge from b2 to b3 to connect the orphaned computation to its nearest downstream usage.
Added data_flow edge from b3 to b6 to connect the orphaned computation to the return node, which is its nearest assignment consumer.
Changed the edge label from b4 to b5 from 'control_flow' to 'data_flow' to correct the flow mismatch, implying b5 consumes data from b4.
Added data_flow edge from b3 to b6 to connect the disconnected return node to the nearest assignment (b3).
